parsed_output.justification: Mitchell makes a highly suspicious and contradictory claim that he was the Tanner but was robbed by Mike. If this were true, Mitchell would no longer be the Tanner and would have no incentive to claim that role, as the Tanner only wins by being voted out. Furthermore, Mitchell quickly pivots from this confusing claim to agreeing with James's decision to vote for Mike, suggesting he is attempting to divert suspicion and manipulate the group's target.

validation.justification: Mitchell makes a highly suspicious and contradictory claim that he was the Tanner but was robbed by Mike. If this were true, Mitchell would no longer be the Tanner and would have no incentive to claim that role, as the Tanner only wins by being voted out. Furthermore, Mitchell quickly pivots from this confusing claim to agreeing with James's decision to vote for Mike, suggesting he is attempting to divert suspicion and manipulate the group's target.
